'''ladata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinosyladenine|arabinosyladenine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinosyladenine|arabinosyladenine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ladata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lædætæth || lædætæj || lædætæsh || lædætæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ladadatath || ladadataj || ladadatash || ladadata
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ladatath || ladataj || ladatash || ladata
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ladaftafth || ladaftafj || ladaftafsh || ladaftaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ladatatha || ladataja || ladatasha || ladataka
|-
| [[Patient]] || ladatath || ladataj || ladatash || ladata
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ladatathal || ladatajal || ladatashal || ladatakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ladataathatha || ladataajaja || ladataashasha || ladataaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || ladatathan || ladatajan || ladatashan || ladatakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ladatathaoro || ladatajaoro || ladatashaoro || ladatakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
